description: Answers to frequently asked questions about lodging using myTax.

content_text:
## Who can use myTax ?
Regardless of how you lodged your tax return last year (or even if you didn't lodge), if you are eligible to lodge this year, then you can use myTax . This includes if you previously lodged:
- using e-tax
- on paper
- using a tax agent
- through a Tax Help volunteer, or
- at an ATO Shopfront.
This year, as long as you are eligible, you can use myTax :
- at work, the local library, café or other public computer
- on any mobile device including a tablet or smartphone
- at an ATO Shopfront (make an appointment)
- through Tax Help
- from overseas (though not if you have foreign income)
- even if you are lodging for the first time, or
- even if you have already started an e-tax return (as long as you haven't already lodged).
Find out if you’re eligible .
